name: V0Map Voice City Project Board
description: Importable project management board for live WordPress shortcode/NPC city work.

tasks.title: Verify WordPress API ping, health, features, and shortcode windows
Open pinned Brand GPT [bsp_app] and confirm full styling loads
Turn on realtime voice agent and test command mode
Switch to dictation mode and capture one project note
Say NPC 1 come here and verify window opens
Add Yuka path node, project room, habit board, and task kanban to the 3D city
Import 25/50/100 NPC team presets and assign floors
Test next, previous, close, widescreen, and menu items below window

habits.name: Run one realtime voice NPC command
